title: Pushing My AI Dark Factory to Its Limits with Opus + Kimi Combined
summary: An approach to optimize AI agent performance by using Claude Opus for deep reasoning and planning steps while using Kimi K2.6 for implementation, validation, and research, allowing cost-efficient scaling without sacrificing reasoning power where it matters. This mixed-model strategy assigns stronger reasoning capabilities to bottleneck tasks only.
